name: Wireless Display (Taichi)
subtitle: Use your iPhone or iPad as a wireless Mac display

apps.name: Wireless Display
apps.subtitle: Wireless extended display for your Mac
apps.localizedDescription: Turn your iPhone or iPad into a wireless extended display for your Mac over Wi-Fi (a from-scratch Duet/Luna-style app). Run the macOS sender, then connect from here. Alpha software.
apps.versionDescription: Alpha: wireless extended display, per-device aspect + rotation, live settings, reconnection recovery, peer-to-peer (works on isolated Wi-Fi).

versions.localizedDescription: Alpha: wireless extended display, per-device aspect + rotation, live settings, reconnection recovery, peer-to-peer (works on isolated Wi-Fi).
